title: Anxiety/panic (starter evidence summary)
text:
Telephone triage for panic-like symptoms must prioritize ruling out emergencies and self-harm risk.

Emergency red flags (ER now):
- Chest pain/pressure, severe shortness of breath, fainting, or neurologic symptoms
- Thoughts of self-harm or feeling unsafe

Urgent evaluation (same-day):
- Symptoms triggered by substances/stimulants with persistent palpitations or severe symptoms

Supportive measures (if low risk and improving):
- Reassurance, slow breathing, reduce triggers; seek follow-up care for ongoing anxiety.
- Seek in-person care if symptoms worsen or any red flags occur.
